content: Like a non-gallery type of channel! Specifically a text channel where you can talk about what artworks you plan to work on or anything about fanworks about the game... for example: channel contents would be like "I'm currently working on a WIP of a Ramona fanart, I want to share it to you guys!" Or "I wanna practice drawing awakeners but idk who, please do reply with suggestions" then everyone can freely join in the convo... idk if that made sense... it can also serve as an overall fanart discussion channel
